SubLayerProcessing.SQLScript:
SELECT DISTINCT 
	 p.Client AS clientCode
	,CAST(p.PECProgramYear AS INT) AS pecProgramYear
	,p.POCode AS poCode
	,p.POName AS poName
	,p.PracticeCode AS practiceCode
	,p.PracticeName AS practiceName
	,p.EngagedDate AS engagedDate
	,p.DisengagedDate AS disengagedDate
	,p.TargetStatus AS targetedStatus
	,p.ParticipationDecision AS participationDecision
	,p.Product AS product
	,hash(concat(IfNull(p.Client,"") ,"|",IfNull(p.PECProgramYear,"") ,"|",IfNull(p.PracticeCode,""))) AS hashKey
FROM PECPracticeTargetEngagementStatus p 
	INNER JOIN (select MAX(FileID) AS LatestFileId FROM PECPracticeTargetEngagementStatus) lpt 
		ON p.FileID = lpt.LatestFileId
SubLayerProcessing.MergeScript:
MERGE INTO DestinationTable t USING (
  SELECT
    ss.clientCode,
    ss.pecProgramYear,
    ss.poCode,
    ss.poName,
    ss.practiceCode,
    ss.practiceName,
    ss.engagedDate,
    ss.disengagedDate,
    ss.targetedStatus,
    ss.participationDecision,
    ss.product,
    ifnull(ss.hashKey, dt.hashKey) AS hashKey,
    CASE
      WHEN ss.hashKey = dt.hashKey THEN 'RecordsToUpdate'
      WHEN ss.hashKey IS NOT NULL THEN 'RecordsToInsert'
      ELSE 'RecordsToDelete'
    END AS Source
  FROM tempSQLScript ss 
     FULL OUTER JOIN DestinationTable dt 
       ON ss.HashKey = dt.HashKey
) s ON  t.hashKey = s.hashKey
WHEN MATCHED AND s.Source = 'RecordsToDelete' THEN 
  DELETE
WHEN MATCHED AND s.Source = 'RecordsToUpdate' AND s.hashKey IS NOT NULL THEN
  UPDATE
  SET
    clientCode = s.clientCode,
    pecProgramYear = s.pecProgramYear,
    poCode = s.poCode,
    poName = s.poName,
    practiceCode = s.practiceCode,
    practiceName = s.practiceName,
    engagedDate = s.engagedDate,
    disengagedDate = s.disengagedDate,
    targetedStatus = s.targetedStatus,
    participationDecision = s.participationDecision,
    product = s.product,
    hashKey = s.hashKey
WHEN NOT MATCHED AND s.hashKey IS NOT NULL THEN
  INSERT (
      clientCode,
      pecProgramYear,
      poCode,
      poName,
      practiceCode,
      practiceName,
      engagedDate,
      disengagedDate,
      targetedStatus,
      participationDecision,
      product,
      hashkey
  )
  VALUES(
      s.clientCode,
      s.pecProgramYear,
      s.poCode,
      s.poName,
      s.practiceCode,
      s.practiceName,
      s.engagedDate,
      s.disengagedDate,
      s.targetedStatus,
      s.participationDecision,
      s.product,
      s.hashkey
    )
